phrases.intent_en: Where is the funicular ticket kiosk?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de bilhetes do elevador?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka oo bal-SOWN-jee bil-YEH-tish-doo eh-leh-va-DOR
phrases.cultural_note: Locals call the funicular elevador. The kiosk operates seasonally near the upper stop.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à estação do funicular.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH shtuh-SOWN DOO foo-nee-koo-LAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the funicular station.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the funicular station.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH shtuh-SOWN DOO foo-nee-koo-LAHR.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto à estação do funicular.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro do Suberco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Suberco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Suberco viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Suberco viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Suberco.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar uma zona de estacionamento pago por aqui?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o parque de estacionamento perto do Miradouro do Suberco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too PEHR-too DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the parking lot near Miradouro do Suberco.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the parking lot near Miradouro do Suberco.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too PEHR-too DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o parque de estacionamento perto do Miradouro do Suberco.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro do Sítio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO SEET-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Sítio area is the historic upper village, known for traditional crafts and surfing culture.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Sítio a partir do Miradouro do Suberco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO SEET-yoo AH puh-ruh-TEER DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Sítio viewpoint from the Suberco viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Sítio viewpoint from the Suberco viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO SEET-yoo AH puh-ruh-TEER DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Sítio a partir do Miradouro do Suberco.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro do Suberco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Suberco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Suberco viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Suberco viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Suberco.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Nossa Senhora da Nazaré Church?
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra a Igreja de Nossa Senhora?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee see-en-KON-trah ah-ee-JAY-grah jee NO-sah see-NYO-rah
phrases.cultural_note: This sanctuary is tied to local maritime traditions and attracts pilgrims year-round.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na praça central do bairro.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH PRAH-suh sayngt-RAHL DOO BEYE-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the neighborhood central square.

responses.english: Good morning, in the neighborhood central square.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH PRAH-suh sayngt-RAHL DOO BEYE-roo.
responses.local: Bom dia, na praça central do bairro.

phrases.text_local: Onde está o Farol da Nazaré?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW fuh-RAWL DUH nuh-zuh-REH?
phrases.cultural_note: The lighthouse marks the historic edge of the fishing promontory and guides local vessels.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no extremo sul do rochedo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO ehst-REH-moo SOOW DOO roo-SHEH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the southern end of the cliff.

responses.english: Good morning, at the southern end of the cliff.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO ehst-REH-moo SOOW DOO roo-SHEH-doo.
responses.local: Bom dia, no extremo sul do rochedo.
